allow: Bash(wsl bash -c 'search_id=""tropical-rainforest""; grep -qi ""$search_id"" biome-distribution/stages/climate/precipitation.yml && echo Y || echo N')
Bash(wsl bash -c "which zip || apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep zip || echo ''zip not found''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "$csv = Import-Csv C:\\Projects\\terra-origen\\.scripts\\BiomeTable.csv; $csv | Where-Object { $_''rearth'' -ne ''0.0000%'' } | Select-Object BiomeID,rearth | ForEach-Object { if \($_BiomeID -match ''DESERT'' -or $_BiomeID -match ''OASIS''\) { $_} }")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "cd C:\\Projects\\terra-origen; python .scripts\\calculate_biome_percentages.py 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern ''Processing preset: rearth'' -Context 0,100 | Select-Object -First 1")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command @"
cd C:\\Projects\\terra-origen
Write-Host ''=== Checking for ice-cap/tundra/boreal presence in origen2 ==='' -ForegroundColor Cyan
python -c @''
import yaml, sys
from pathlib import Path
sys.path.insert\(0, ''.scripts''\)
from calculate_biome_percentages import PresetAnalyzer, BiomeDistribution

analyzer = PresetAnalyzer\(Path\(''biome-distribution/presets/origen2.yml''\)\)
distribution = analyzer.get_source_distribution\(\)

print\(''\\nInitial source distribution:''\)
for biome, prob in sorted\(distribution.probabilities.items\(\)\):
    print\(f''  {biome}: {prob:.4%}''\)

# Process through temperature stage
stage_files = analyzer.get_stage_files\(\)
for i, stage_ref in enumerate\(stage_files[:5]\):
    if ''temperature.yml'' in str\(stage_ref\):
        print\(f''\\nAfter temperature stage:''\)
        stages = analyzer.load_stage_file\(stage_ref\)
        from calculate_biome_percentages import StageProcessor
        for stage in stages:
            distribution = StageProcessor.process_stage\(stage, distribution\)
        
        print\(''All biomes:''\)
        for biome, prob in sorted\(distribution.probabilities.items\(\), key=lambda x: -x[1]\):
            print\(f''  {biome}: {prob:.4%}''\)
        break
''@
"@)
